name: I got hurt in a warehouse accident at work in Salt Lake City last night - what do I do first?
description: Seek medical care now, report to employer in writing within 30 days (Utah rule), document everything.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: I got hurt in a warehouse accident at work in Salt Lake City last night - what do I do first?

acceptedAnswer.text: Seek medical care now, report to employer in writing within 30 days (Utah rule), document everything.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Immediately seek medical attention, even if injuries seem minor, and report the accident to your employer within 30 days as required in Utah.** Warehouse injuries often involve workers' compensation claims, which cover medical bills and lost wages regardless of fault.[1][4] Key factors include: documenting the incident with photos and witness contacts; notifying your supervisor in writing; avoiding statements to insurance adjusters without advice. File a workers' comp claim promptly through your employer's insurer; consult a lawyer if denied or complicated. Most claims succeed with proper reporting.[4]
